tasks.title: Enhance RestaurantDetail Data Model
tasks.description: Expand the RestaurantDetail Pydantic model to include comprehensive fields for individual restaurant page data
tasks.details: Add fields for address, phone, website, social media, hours, ratings, reviews, cuisine types, features, and metadata. Ensure proper validation and optional field handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for model validation with various data combinations

tasks.title: Update Database Schema
tasks.description: Add new columns to restaurants table for enhanced data fields
tasks.details: Create Supabase migration to add columns for all new RestaurantDetail fields. Ensure proper data types and constraints.
tasks.testStrategy: Test migration rollback and data integrity

tasks.title: Implement Individual Page Scraping Engine
tasks.description: Create core logic to visit and scrape individual restaurant detail pages
tasks.details: Build async function to visit restaurant URLs, handle page loading, and coordinate extraction strategies.
tasks.testStrategy: Test with sample restaurant URLs and various page layouts

tasks.title: CSS Selector-Based Data Extraction
tasks.description: Implement primary extraction strategy using CSS selectors for common page elements
tasks.details: Map HappyCow page structure to CSS selectors for extracting address, phone, hours, ratings, etc.
tasks.testStrategy: Test extraction accuracy across multiple restaurant pages

tasks.title: Regex Fallback Extraction
tasks.description: Implement regex-based extraction as fallback when CSS selectors fail
tasks.details: Create regex patterns for extracting data from HTML when structured selectors aren't available.
tasks.testStrategy: Test fallback triggers and extraction accuracy

tasks.title: LLM-Based Complex Extraction
tasks.description: Implement LLM extraction for complex cases where structured methods fail
tasks.details: Use Ollama/LLM to extract data from complex or non-standard page layouts as final fallback.
tasks.testStrategy: Test LLM accuracy and performance on edge cases

tasks.title: Enhanced Caching and Duplicate Detection
tasks.description: Implement intelligent caching to avoid re-scraping detailed restaurant data
tasks.details: Check database for existing detailed records, implement data freshness logic, and skip re-processing when appropriate.
tasks.testStrategy: Test cache hit/miss scenarios and data staleness detection

tasks.title: Individual Page Error Handling and Retry Logic
tasks.description: Implement robust error handling for individual page failures
tasks.details: Handle HTTP errors, timeouts, parsing failures with retry logic and partial data saving.
tasks.testStrategy: Test various failure scenarios and recovery mechanisms

tasks.title: Enhanced Rate Limiting for Individual Pages
tasks.description: Adapt anti-detection measures for increased request volume from individual page scraping
tasks.details: Implement adaptive delays, enhanced blocking detection, and graceful degradation for individual page requests.
tasks.testStrategy: Test rate limiting behavior under various load conditions

tasks.title: Progress Tracking and Monitoring
tasks.description: Implement detailed progress tracking for individual restaurant processing
tasks.details: Track individual restaurant processing status, success rates, and provide detailed logging for monitoring.
tasks.testStrategy: Test progress reporting accuracy and performance impact

tasks.title: Configuration Options for Individual Page Scraping
tasks.description: Add configuration options to control individual page scraping behavior
tasks.details: Add config options for enabling/disabling individual scraping, concurrency limits, data freshness thresholds.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all configuration combinations and edge cases

tasks.title: End-to-End Testing and Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Comprehensive testing and optimization of the complete individual page scraping system
tasks.details: Test complete workflow with multiple cities, benchmark performance, optimize bottlenecks, and validate data quality.
tasks.testStrategy: Full integration tests with performance benchmarks and data validation
